summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GoHighLevel (GHL) integration for post-application approval process. All backend endpoints working correctly (11/12 tests passed, 1 skipped). Frontend Applications Review page fully functional with new GHL status badges, timeline component, and qualification workflow.
critical_code_review_comments: GHL integration properly implemented with mock mode support (no real API keys configured)
Student model extended with ghl_contact_id, booking_link_sent, call_booked_at, qualification_status fields
Status ENUM extended with call_booking_sent, call_booked, interview_completed, qualified
ApplicationsReviewPage has proper timeline component showing application progress
Qualification buttons (Mark as Passed/Failed) correctly appear only for interview_completed status

success_rate.backend: 92% (11/12 tests passed, 1 skipped - no under_review students to test approval)

seed_data_creation: Two test students exist: Pending Student (call_booking_sent), Enrolled Student (qualified)
context_for_next_testing_agent: GHL integration is in MOCK MODE - all email sending is logged but not actually sent. The ghl_contact_id remains null in mock mode. All GHL-related statuses and the qualification workflow are working correctly.

login_and_access.super_admin_login: WORKING - successfully logs in and redirects to /portal/admin

applications_review_ui.stats_cards: WORKING - shows Total Applications, Docs Uploaded, Under Review, Approved
applications_review_ui.student_list: WORKING - displays students with correct status badges
applications_review_ui.status_filter: WORKING - all GHL statuses available (call_booking_sent, call_booked, interview_completed, qualified)
applications_review_ui.detail_panel: WORKING - shows student details, status badges, documents

timeline_component.display: WORKING - shows 7 steps: Registered → Docs Uploaded → Approved → Booking Sent → Call Booked → Interview Done → Qualified
timeline_component.progress_indication: WORKING - completed steps shown in green, pending in gray

status_badges.booking_sent_badge: WORKING - green badge with checkmark shown for booking link sent students
status_badges.status_labels: WORKING - all new statuses display with correct colors (call_booking_sent: purple, qualified: emerald)

api_endpoints.GET /api/admin/applications: WORKING - returns students with all GHL fields
api_endpoints.POST /api/crm/students/:id/send-booking-: WORKING - sends booking email (mocked) and updates status
api_endpoints.POST /api/webhooks/ghl: WORKING - endpoint exists and validates signature

mocked_apis.GoHighLevel_API: MOCKED - emails logged but not sent, ghl_contact_id returns mock ID

applications_review_page.layout: Clean split view - list on left, detail panel on right
applications_review_page.colors: Proper use of status colors - green for completed, purple for booking_sent, amber for pending
applications_review_page.contrast: Good contrast - dark text on light backgrounds
